name: pangaea-ui
description: Pangaea design system — per-component versioned packages (@labspangaea/ds-*) + an Astro component gallery. Tokens ported verbatim from pangaea.id (DESIGN.md: two-hex blue-on-white, dual-theme). Structured so any component can be deployed as a federated remote later (peer-react, isolated ESM, separate tokens) — but no federation machinery is built yet.

scripts.build:pkgs: for d in packages/*; do npm run build -w "$d" --if-present; done
scripts.build: npm run build:pkgs && npm run build -w @labspangaea/gallery
scripts.dev: npm run build:pkgs && npm run dev -w @labspangaea/gallery
